_readme: This is the ONLY file you edit day to day. To add a competitor or feed, add one line to the relevant category's 'sources' array. Three source types: {type:'rss', name:'...', url:'...'} for a direct feed; {type:'googlenews', query:'...'} for any news/blog by keyword; {type:'arxiv', cats:['cs.AI','cs.DB']} for research papers. 'name' is optional and just sets the source label shown on the card.

sources.query: Anthropic Claude release OR launch OR update
"Mistral AI" model OR release OR launch
xAI Grok release OR launch OR update
DeepSeek AI model OR release OR launch
Nebius AI launch OR release OR funding
"Azure AI" OR "Azure OpenAI" launch OR update
"Glean" funding OR launch OR acquisition OR feature
"Sana AI" funding OR launch OR acquisition OR feature
Europe AI startup enterprise OR agents -robotics -hardware
AI funding OR acquisition OR merger Europe
